Bartlett Professor Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences Department of Statistics Berkeley AI Research Lab University of California at Berkeley Director Collaboration on the Theoretical Foundations of Deep Learning Director Foundations of Data Science Institute Head Google Research Australia Address: 387 Soda Hall #1776 Berkeley, CA 94720-1776 Phone: 510-642-7780 Fax: 510-642-5775 peter@berkeley.edu Research Interests: Machine learning, statistical learning theory, pattern classification, adaptive control, reinforcement learning.
